name: FncIdsCoExtr

text.value: WITH stextr AS (SELECT DISTINCT CD_MPPNG_SK, SRC_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SRC_DOMAIN_NM = 'STATE'), extrco AS (SELECT Company_Id, Company_Name, Full_Address, Address_Line_1, Address_Line_2, City, State, Zip, NAIC_Number, Tax_Id FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.co_tmp_FncIdsCoExtr), final AS (SELECT extrco.Company_Id AS CO_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSk} AS SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, extrco.Company_Name AS CO_LGL_NM, extrco.Full_Address AS FULL_CO_MAIL_ADDR_TX, extrco.Address_Line_1 AS CO_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, CASE WHEN LEN(RTRIM(LTRIM(COALESCE(extrco.Address_Line_2, ''))))=0 THEN ' ' ELSE extrco.Address_Line_2 END AS CO_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, extrco.City AS CO_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, stextr.CD_MPPNG_SK AS CO_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, CASE WHEN LEN(extrco.Zip)=10 THEN SUBSTRING(extrco.Zip,1,5) ELSE extrco.Zip END AS CO_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, CASE WHEN LEN(extrco.Zip)=10 THEN SUBSTRING(extrco.Zip,6,4) ELSE '    ' END AS CO_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, CASE WHEN RTRIM(LTRIM(COALESCE(extrco.NAIC_Number, '')))= '' THEN ' ' ELSE extrco.NAIC_Number END AS NAIC_ID, CASE WHEN extrco.Tax_Id IS NULL OR RTRIM(LTRIM(extrco.Tax_Id))= '' THEN ' ' ELSE LEFT(extrco.Tax_Id, CHARINDEX(',', extrco.Tax_Id + ',') -1 ) END AS TAX_ID FROM extrco LEFT JOIN stextr ON stextr.SRC_CD=extrco.State) DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.co_transform_tmp_FncIdsCoExtr; SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.co_transform_tmp_FncIdsCoExtr FROM final

Description:

JOB NAME : FncIdsCoExtr

CALLED BY: FncIdsCoCntl

PROCESSING: Extract company dat from workday file on daily.
